S.FORM: faki ÁĒ∑śÄßťē∑Ťľ© šĺčŚŹ•:I cowa ci faki no miso? O tadaso^linay a rihadayay ko niyaro' no 'Amis, mafana' a mapapadang to demak no masamaamaanay a demak no niyaro'. Pakayni to raramod i, maolah ko kaying to pipaini no faki, pasifana'en no faki to cacicfayaw a demak, Ano maraod to ko pipararamodan i, o inato noya kaying ko mamipalimo'ot to wawa ningra.
S.PHON: faki **** **:i ¶o~uwa ¶i faki no~u miso~u? o~u ta…¨~…ģaso~u Ē…ĺinaj a rińßa…¨~…ģajaj ko~u nijaro~u ° no~u °amis, mafana ° a mapapa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u masamaamaanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u nijaro~u °. pakajni to~u raramo~u…¨~…ģ i, mao~u…ĺańß ko~u kajiŇč to~u pipaini no~u faki, pasifana °…ôn no~u faki to~u ¶a ¶i ¶fajaw a …¨~…ģ…ômak, ano~u marao~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~u pipararamo~u…¨~…ģan i, o~u inato~u no~uja kajiŇč ko~u mamipa…ĺimo~u °o~ut to~u wawa niŇčra.
S.FORM: faki ÁĒ∑śÄßťē∑Ťľ© šĺčŚŹ•:I cowa ci faki no miso? O tadaso^linay a rihadayay ko niyaro' no 'Amis, mafana' a mapapadang to demak no masamaamaanay a demak no niyaro'. Pakayni to raramod i, maolah ko kaying to pipaini no faki, pasifana'en no faki to cacicfayaw a demak, Ano maraod to ko pipararamodan i, o inato noya kaying ko mamipalimo'ot to wawa ningra.
